mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.status, o.create_time AS createTime, o.update_time AS updateTime, u.username FROM shop_order o LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop_order WHERE user_id = #{userId}
AND status = #{status}

SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.status, o.create_time AS createTime, o.update_time AS updateTime, u.username FROM shop_order o LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_order (user_id, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, datetime('now','localtime'), datetime('now','localtime'))
mapper.update: UPDATE shop_order SET status = #{status}, update_time = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop_order o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = #{productId} AND o.status IN ('PENDING', 'SHIPPED')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop_order o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND oi.product_id = #{productId} AND o.status IN ('SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED')
